speaker: Carlos
content: Dinner with Tanaka ran long. I'm sorry.

speaker: Gabrielle
content: You know, Carlos, I didn't marry you so I could have dinner by myself 6 times a week.
mark: I didn't marry you so I could have dinner by myself. 我嫁给你可不是为了一周有六天都自己一个人吃晚饭。
主语 +  don't /didn't + 动作 + so (that) +  主语 +  （不希望发生的）结果 / 状态翻译时，一律译为：我做某事，才不是为了…
I didn't do A so I could do B，是英语里表达 **“我做 A，才不是为了 B”** 的经典句式。

speaker: Gabrielle
content: You know how bored I was today? I came this close to actually cleaning the house.
mark: come close to doing sth 差点做某事；接近做某事。在这里，“to” 是一个介词，而不是不定式符号，所以后面要接动名词形式（doing）。

speaker: Carlos
content: Don't be that way. I got you a gift.
mark: Don't be that way 别这样

speaker: Gabrielle
content: Nope. You're not going to buy your way out of this one.
mark: buy your way out of sth 通过花钱的方式从…中脱身；靠花钱来摆脱…

speaker: Carlos
content: Yeah. Put it on and then make love to me.

speaker: Gabrielle
content: I'm not in the mood. But we could stay up and talk.
mark: in the mood 心情好，有兴致

speaker: Carlos
content: When a man buys a woman expensive jewelry, there are many things he may want in return, for future reference, conversation ain't one of them.
mark: for future reference 供以后参考 reference n. 提及，谈到；参考，查阅；引言，引文；
ain't 不是；没有非正式的缩写，通常用于英语口语中，是am not、is not、are not、has not 或 have not的缩写形式。

speaker: Carlos
content: Hey, that was a joke. What the hell is wrong with you?
mark: What the hell is wrong with you? 你到底怎么回事？hell n. 地狱；苦难的经历

speaker: Gabrielle
mark: Let go of me 放开我 let me go更强调我想要离开的意愿，而let go of me更强调你应该放开我的动作。

speaker: Carlos
content: You've been acting like a nightmare for a month. What's wrong? I can't fix it unless you tell me.
mark: have been doing 现在完成进行时：一直在做某事：表示过去某个时间点开始做某事，并一直持续到现在。
nightmare n. 噩梦；可怕的经历

speaker: Carlos
content: So what am I supposed to do?
mark: what am I supposed to do? 我应该做什么？我该怎么办？

speaker: Gabrielle
content: I don't know. Be the way you used to be. Surprise me. Take my breath away.
mark: Be the way you used to be 做回你曾经的样子
take one’s breath away 使大吃一惊 breath: 呼吸
